name: p0-system-spaces-playable-entry
title: P0 make system-created spaces playable
description: Expose built-in public welfare tavern gameplay definitions as visitor first-screen playable actions.
creator: lijin
notes: System-created/public-welfare spaces already have published gameplay_definitions in backend default_taverns.py. This change exposes those definitions as doorway gameplay buttons on /tavern/:id for visitors, starts existing gameplay sessions on click, preserves no-chat auto-send behavior, and falls back to existing quick composer actions when no published gameplay exists. Validation passed: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck; npm --prefix .\frontend run build; Playwright mocked pw_midnight_commission_board desktop/mobile and verified 3 gameplay entries, gameplay session panel after click, 0 /chat calls. Screenshots/report under artifacts/validation/p0-system-spaces-playable-entry-2026-06-03.
